goal: Rename all in-file project references from gorechera/Gorechera to gorchera/Gorchera across the repository without renaming any filesystem paths, then verify the Go project still builds and tests.
summary: Verify Apply a repo-wide content rename with controlled scope: update the Go module path in go.mod, replace Go import prefixes and string literals in .go/.md/.json files, update .gorechera state/artifact path references to .gorchera, refresh project/docs/config mentions including CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, docs, README.md, and .mcp.json, while intentionally leaving on-disk directory names unchanged such as cmd/gorechera and any real .gorechera directory. After edits, verify there are no remaining in-scope gorechera/Gorechera content references and confirm the repository passes go build ./... and go test ./.... with required steps: implement
tester_instructions: Read the verification contract before running tests.
Use the contract to choose only the tests needed for the current step.
Return the exact commands, outcomes, and artifacts produced.
evaluator_criteria: tester output references the verification contract
tester output includes concrete artifacts or logs
required step coverage matches the sprint contract
